name: Minimal Nameplate
description: Minimal class-badge & name nameplates that replace the game's overhead plate.
author: Stellar

added: Initial release: role-colored class badge + optional player name over players' heads, drawn into the game's HUD render pass (crisp + depth-occluded).
Mirrors the game's nameplate visibility — global HUD switch (HideUI / cutscene / photo / menu), per-type head-info settings, and per-entity hides (tag / hide-and-seek).
In-window controls: enable, show class icon, show name, hide-self, badge size, name size.
